　　然而不巧的是，他是唐僧的上一世。
　　这可不是什么好事！
　　要知道，唐僧的前九世都被沙和尚吃了。
　　吾命休矣！
　　就在杨安准备逃离东土大隋时，他觉醒了《取经变强》系统。
　　西天取经，每向西一步，就可以获得一年修为。
　　九九八十一难，每过一难，就可以获得海量天道功德。
　　名下三弟子，外加一记名弟子时，就可以证道混元。
　　到达西天取得大乘佛法，更是可以证得混元无极。
　　所以身为大隋六皇子的杨安，剃发修行，去西天“取”经。
　　从此，西游路上的妖怪，可就遭老罪了。
　　杨安：妖怪，贫僧要你们助我渡劫。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d262c1cf6d55861f1c6bfe34421b5964","author":"进击的狮子","author_id":"","book_id":"7507168343497919512","book_name":"西游：贫僧隋三藏，专治各种不服","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7507168409860178456","read_count":"27396","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1159892"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"481","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,西游衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7a15a48fd31e2f5c7b6f9d64752db3a4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440873&x-signature=QLlWodhqiU0V7bBtSN1lSXRiJfQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2664809765289784","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"15"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231707532A0DB85E501E307E5067"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_d
